page: Vultr vcg-a40-96c-480g-192vram is a Cloud GPU family server designed for heavy parallel processing workloads. It features an x86_64 Intel CPU architecture with 96 physical cores and 96 vCPUs, operating with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio on a shared CPU allocation. The system is equipped with 480.0 GB of system memory, providing 5.0 GB of RAM per core.

The primary acceleration is delivered by four NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPUs, providing a combined total of 192 GB of VRAM. Local storage consists of a bundled 1400 GB NVMe SSD, which supports high-speed data access for large datasets. The server also includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, this instance offers a high density of GPU resources and system memory relative to the shared CPU allocation. This configuration is optimized for workloads that rely heavily on GPU acceleration rather than dedicated single-core CPU performance. Appropriate workloads include large-scale machine learning model training, deep learning inference, 3D rendering, and data science pipelines requiring substantial VRAM and system memory.
description: Vultr vcg-a40-96c-480g-192vram is a high-density GPU server designed for parallel computing and data-intensive workloads. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it features 96 Intel physical cores and 96 vCPUs under a shared allocation model, paired with 480.0 GB of system memory. Acceleration is driven by four NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPUs delivering a total of 192 GB of VRAM. Storage is supported by a bundled 1400 GB NVMe SSD, ensuring rapid data retrieval. This hardware profile provides a qualitative balance of massive GPU memory and system RAM, making it highly efficient for workloads that prioritize GPU-bound processing over dedicated CPU execution. It is suited for machine learning training, large-scale AI inference, data science, and complex rendering tasks.
og_description: Vultr vcg-a40-96c-480g-192vram is a Cloud GPU server featuring 96 Intel cores, 480 GB RAM, four NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPUs with 192 GB total VRAM, and a 1400 GB NVMe SSD for intensive parallel computing.

tagline: A high-density GPU server featuring four NVIDIA Ampere A40 accelerators, 480 GB of RAM, and fast NVMe local storage.

96 Intel physical cores and 96 vCPUs on a shared allocation
480.0 GB of system memory (5.0 GB per core)
Bundled 1400 GB NVMe SSD local storage
Optimized for machine learning, AI inference, and 3D rendering
